description: A single discharge from this plasma rifle easily melts through conventional armor and flash-incinerates anything behind it, but its state of disrepair limits the number of shots it can fire in quick succession.

Even a second of exposure to the plasma fan generated by this weapon is enough to flash-incinerate anything, but its state of disrepair limits the amount of time its destructive power can be sustained.

A boxy rifle-like weapon made of unnaturally dense bone and plastic, sporting a series of <meta_colors> LEDs along the length of the barrel.  Tubes, wires, and plastic-like sinew dangle from where it was pulled free of a fleshy, turret-like creature.  It has a trigger and a connection for a battery pack, if you can find batteries that fit.
